name: RKW Bus Driving Inc
service_types: vehicle driving school / possibly contract school bus driving
districts_or_customers: Unknown; small Eastern Shore MD operator near Crisfield (Somerset County)
recent_news: No M&A or news found; D&B lists company as incorporated in MD since 2008 as a Vehicle Driving School. No website, minimal digital footprint.
fit_notes: Not a credible Summit tuck-in: 1 employee, ~$29K revenue, appears to be an owner-operator driving school / sole-prop bus driver rather than a contracted student transportation fleet. Sub-scale even for a tuck-in.

name: Wheelchair Transportation Svc

fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator and not a fit for Summit. Pure NEMT/wheelchair van micro-business in Manhattan; no SPED-route or school-district contracts indicated. Too small and outside Summit's contracted student transportation thesis.
